issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates DuringYourTurn, not EndOfTurn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' to match the temporary nature of the effect within the current turn.
Target should specify 'Leader or Character' (CardType) in addition to the Land of Wano subType filter. Current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacter' doesn't account for Leader cards.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' appears to be erroneous boilerplate. This card has no self-play mechanic mentioned in the official text.
